to generate the SAX event stream.
A separate path exists for RDFS and OWL schema output builders that do not use
the SAX + XSLT pipeline above. SchemaGenerator subclasses (OWLGenerator,
RDFSGenerator, RDFSBasedGenerator) traverse ProfileClass objects directly and
emit OWL/RDFS triples into a result OntModel:
The resulting OntModel is then serialized to RDF/XML directly, bypassing
